title: 10 best herbal capsules for swollen feet
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for swollen feet are dietary supplements that contain a variety of natural herbs and plant extracts, known for their anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties. These capsules help reduce swelling in the feet by promoting blood circulation, reducing inflammation, and eliminating excess fluid retention in the body. Examples of herbal ingredients found in these capsules include turmeric, ginger, dandelion, and willow bark. By taking herbal capsules, individuals can experience relief from swollen feet, improving their mobility, and overall quality of life. For instance, a person who spends long hours standing at work may find relief by taking herbal capsules, reducing the discomfort and pain associated with swollen feet, and allowing them to stay active and productive throughout the day.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Arnica flower capsule helps with swollen feet because it contains anti-inflammatory compounds that can reduce swelling and pain. Arnica has been used for centuries to treat a variety of conditions, including muscle aches, sprains, and bruises. When taken as a capsule, the active ingredients in arnica, such as helenalin and dihydrohelenalin, are absorbed into the bloodstream and can help to reduce inflammation in the feet. This can be especially helpful for individuals who spend long periods of time on their feet or who have conditions such as edema, which can cause fluid to build up in the feet and ankles. By reducing inflammation, arnica flower capsules can help to alleviate swelling and promote healthy circulation in the feet.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Arnica flower capsules contain sesquiterpene lactones, which help reduce inflammation and swelling in the feet by inhibiting the production of inflammatory chemicals.
Analgesic: Arnica flower capsules have helenalin and dihydrohelenalin, which act as natural painkillers, providing relief from discomfort caused by swollen feet.
Circulatory stimulant: Arnica flower capsules contain essential oils and flavonoids that promote blood circulation, helping to alleviate swelling in the feet by reducing fluid buildup.
Diuretic: Arnica flower capsules possess diuretic properties due to the presence of tannins and volatile oils, which help eliminate excess fluid from the body, reducing swelling in the feet.
Tissue repair: Arnica flower capsules contain thymol and other compounds that promote tissue healing and regeneration, helping to repair damaged tissues in the feet and reduce swelling.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Contain beneficial compounds such as sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce swelling in feet.
Roots: Rich in helenalin, a potent anti-inflammatory compound, making it useful for alleviating swelling and inflammation in the feet.
Leaves: Contain similar beneficial compounds as the flowers, offering soothing and anti-inflammatory effects that can help with swollen feet.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2-3 tablespoons of dried arnica flower flowers and grind them into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the arnica flower powder with 0.5-1 teaspoon of a binding agent such as tapioca starch or powdered gelatin.
Add just enough water to create a thick, moldable paste.
Form the paste into small, equal-sized capsules using a capsule maker tool, allowing them to dry for 24 hours.
Store the dried arnica flower capsules in a cool, dark place for up to six months, taking 1-2 capsules up to three times daily as needed for swollen feet.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Daisy capsule helps with swollen feet because it contains anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce inflammation and relieve discomfort. The herb works by improving the circulation of blood and lymph fluid in the body, which can help to reduce swelling in the feet. Additionally, daisy has natural diuretic properties that can help to eliminate excess fluid from the body, further reducing swelling. Its antioxidant properties also help to protect cells from damage, promoting overall health and well-being. By taking daisy capsules, individuals can experience relief from swollen feet and improved leg health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Daisy capsules contain anti-inflammatory compounds, such as flavonoids, that help reduce swelling in feet by decreasing inflammation and improving blood circulation.
Diuretic: Daisy capsules have diuretic properties due to the presence of essential oils and tannins, which help eliminate excess fluid from the body, thus alleviating swelling in the feet.
Antioxidant: The antioxidant properties of daisy capsules, attributed to flavonoids and phenolic acids, protect cells from damage, promoting overall foot health and reducing swelling.
Analgesic: Daisy capsules contain pain-relieving compounds, such as sesquiterpene lactones, that help alleviate discomfort and pain associated with swollen feet.
Venotonic: The venotonic effect of daisy capsules, resulting from their flavonoid content, strengthens and supports vein walls, improving blood flow and reducing swelling in the feet.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the daisy plant have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce swelling in the feet.
Leaves: The leaves of the daisy plant are rich in flavonoids, which can help improve circulation and reduce inflammation in the feet.
Flowers: The flowers of the daisy plant contain essential oils that can help stimulate blood flow and alleviate swelling in the feet.
Buds: The buds of the daisy plant are a rich source of antioxidants that can help reduce inflammation and promote healing in swollen feet.
Seeds: The seeds of the daisy plant contain essential fatty acids that can help reduce inflammation and improve circulation in the feet.
remedy_recipe: Gather fresh daisy flowers, rinse, and dry thoroughly, ensuring 2 cups are collected.
Finely chop the dried daisy flowers and blend with 1 cup of preferred carrier powder (e.g., tapioca starch or rice flour).
Evenly distribute the daisy-powder mixture into size 00 gelatin or vegetarian capsules, using a capsule filling machine or by hand.
Seal the capsules, ensuring airtight storage in a dry, dark place for up to 3 months.
Take 2-3 capsules, twice daily, as needed for swollen feet, with a suggested dosage of 500-600 mg per capsule.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsule helps with swollen feet because it contains anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce inflammation and swelling in the feet. The herb's active compounds, such as flavonoids and carotenoids, work to improve circulation and reduce pain, making it an effective natural remedy for people suffering from swollen feet due to various reasons like long hours of standing, injury, or medical conditions like edema or diabetes. Additionally, pot marigold has been shown to strengthen the capillary walls, which can further alleviate symptoms of swollen feet, providing relief and promoting overall foot health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Pot marigold contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and carotenoids, which help reduce swelling in feet by alleviating inflammation and promoting better circulation.
Diuretic: The herb has diuretic properties due to its high potassium content, helping the body eliminate excess fluid and reduce swelling in feet.
Venotonic: Pot marigold contains rutin, a flavonoid that strengthens capillaries and veins, improving circulation and reducing swelling caused by poor venous return.
Antimicrobial: The plant has antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent infections in swollen feet and promote faster healing of any existing wounds or sores.
Analgesic: Pot marigold contains pain-relieving compounds, providing relief from discomfort and pain often associated with swollen feet.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Pot marigold flowers are used in medicinal capsules for swollen feet due to their anti-inflammatory properties.
Leaves: The leaves of the pot marigold plant are often used in medicinal capsules for swollen feet because of their soothing and calming effects.
Seeds: Pot marigold seeds are rich in antioxidants and are used in medicinal capsules for swollen feet to help reduce inflammation and promote healing.
Roots: The roots of the pot marigold plant are used in medicinal capsules for swollen feet due to their ability to improve circulation and reduce swelling.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2 cups of dried pot marigold flowers and grind them into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or blender (preparation time: 10-15 minutes).
Measure 500mg of the pot marigold powder and mix it with an appropriate binder such as magnesium stearate or microcrystalline cellulose (preparation time: 5 minutes).
Fill size 00 empty gelatin or vegetarian capsules with the pot marigold-binder mixture using a capsule filling machine or by hand (preparation time: 15-20 minutes).
Allow the filled capsules to dry at room temperature for 24 hours.
Store the finished pot marigold capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dry place, and take 1-2 capsules daily as needed for swollen feet.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Gotu kola capsule helps with swollen feet because it has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various conditions related to the circulatory system. Gotu kola is known to improve blood flow, strengthen blood vessels, and increase collagen production, which can help reduce inflammation and fluid buildup in the feet. Additionally, it has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which can further help alleviate swelling and discomfort in the feet. Overall, gotu kola capsules can provide relief for individuals experiencing swollen feet due to its beneficial effects on the circulatory system and inflammation.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Gotu kola capsules can reduce inflammation, which is important for swollen feet as it helps alleviate the swelling and discomfort caused by fluid buildup. This property is attributed to the triterpene saponins present in gotu kola, particularly asiaticoside, madecassoside, and madasiatic acid.

Venotonic: Gotu kola has the ability to strengthen veins and improve circulation, which is crucial for swollen feet since poor circulation can contribute to fluid retention and swelling. The triterpene saponins, asiaticoside and madecassoside, are responsible for this venotonic effect.

Diuretic: Gotu kola can promote urination and help the body eliminate excess fluid, making it important for swollen feet as it reduces fluid buildup and swelling. The flavonoids present in gotu kola, such as quercetin and kaempferol, contribute to its diuretic effect.

Antioxidant: Gotu kola has antioxidant properties that can protect cells from damage and support overall health, which is important for swollen feet as it helps maintain the health of blood vessels and tissues. The triterpenes, flavonoids, and alkaloids found in gotu kola exhibit potent antioxidant activities.

Collagen synthesis promotion: Gotu kola can stimulate the production of collagen, a protein that helps maintain the structure of blood vessels and tissues. This property is important for swollen feet as it supports the health of blood vessels and connective tissues, reducing the likelihood of fluid buildup and swelling. The triterpene saponins, asiaticoside and madecassoside, are primarily responsible for this effect.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves of gotu kola are commonly used in medicinal capsules for swollen feet due to their anti-inflammatory properties.
Stems: The stems of gotu kola contain compounds that can help improve circulation, reducing swelling in the feet.
Rhizomes: Gotu kola rhizomes are used in medicinal capsules for their ability to strengthen blood vessels and reduce fluid buildup in the feet.
remedy_recipe: Purchase dried gotu kola leaves, size 00 vegetarian capsules, and a capsule filling machine.
Grind 2 tablespoons of dried gotu kola leaves into a fine powder, using a coffee grinder or blender (10 minutes).
Measure 500mg of gotu kola powder per capsule, using a scale, and fill each capsule using the filling machine.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container, in a cool, dry place, for up to 6 months.
Take 1-2 capsules daily, as needed, with a glass of water.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Witch hazel capsule helps with swollen feet because it contains anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce swelling and inflammation. The herbal supplement is derived from the bark and leaves of the witch hazel shrub, which has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties. Witch hazel contains tannins, which have astringent qualities that can help constrict blood vessels and reduce the flow of fluid into tissues, thereby alleviating swelling. Additionally, witch hazel has been shown to improve circulation, which can help reduce fluid buildup in the feet and ankles. By taking witch hazel capsules, individuals may experience relief from swollen feet and improved overall foot health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Witch hazel contains anti-inflammatory compounds like tannins and gallic acid, which help reduce swelling in feet by decreasing inflammation and constricting blood vessels.
Astringent: The astringent properties of witch hazel, due to its high tannin content, help tighten and strengthen blood vessels, reducing fluid leakage into tissues and minimizing swelling.

Venotonic: Witch hazel extract has a venotonic effect, improving the tone of veins and facilitating the return of blood to the heart, which helps alleviate swelling in the feet caused by poor circulation.

Antioxidant: The antioxidant properties of witch hazel, from flavonoids and phenolic acids, help protect blood vessels from oxidative stress and damage, contributing to reduced swelling and better overall vascular health.

Diuretic: Witch hazel may have mild diuretic properties, promoting the elimination of excess fluid from the body, which can help decrease swelling in the feet and promote overall cardiovascular health.
remedy_parts: Bark: The bark of the witch hazel plant contains high levels of tannins, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce swelling in feet.
Leaves: The leaves of the witch hazel plant contain flavonoids and volatile oils, which can help improve circulation and reduce inflammation in the feet.
Flowers: The flowers of the witch hazel plant contain phenolic acids and tannins, which have astringent properties that can help reduce swelling and soothe irritated skin on the feet.
Twigs: The twigs of the witch hazel plant contain high levels of volatile oils, which have anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties that can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling in the feet.
Extract: Witch hazel extract is made from the leaves, bark, and twigs of the plant, and is often used as a natural remedy for reducing swelling and inflammation in the feet.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2 tablespoons of dried witch hazel leaves and 1 tablespoon of dried chamomile flowers.
Grind the herbs into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 teaspoon of the herbal powder with 1 cup of warm water, stirring until a paste forms.
Fill size 00 gelatin capsules with the herbal paste, using a capsule-making tool.
Let the capsules dry for 24 hours before storing in a cool, dark place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marsh tea capsule helps with swollen feet because it has anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce inflammation and swelling. The herb contains flavonoids, which are known to strengthen blood vessels, improve circulation, and reduce the accumulation of fluid in the tissues. Additionally, marsh tea is a natural diuretic, which helps the body eliminate excess fluid and reduce swelling in the feet and ankles. By promoting proper circulation and reducing inflammation, marsh tea capsules can provide relief from swollen feet and improve overall foot health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Marsh tea capsules can help reduce swelling in feet by decreasing inflammation, thanks to the active constituent, ledesmaidin.
Diuretic property: Marsh tea helps flush out excess fluid from the body, including the feet, due to its active compound, potassium.
Vasodilatory property: Marsh tea capsules can help alleviate swollen feet by widening blood vessels, improving circulation, and reducing pressure, owing to the active constituent, rutin.
Analgesic property: The pain associated with swollen feet can be relieved by marsh tea capsules, as they contain active compounds like myricitrin and quercitrin.
Antioxidant property: Marsh tea's rich antioxidant content, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, helps protect cells from damage and supports overall foot health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in anti-inflammatory compounds, the roots help reduce swelling in feet.
Rhizomes: High in therapeutic properties, rhizomes alleviate fluid buildup and soothe swollen feet.
Leaves: Loaded with antioxidants, leaves help decrease inflammation and promote healthy circulation in feet.
Flowers: Packed with soothing agents, flowers provide relief from discomfort and reduce swelling in feet.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2 tablespoons of dried marsh tea leaves and 1 cup of distilled water.
Steep the marsh tea leaves in boiling water for 15-20 minutes, then strain and let cool.
Measure out 500-600mg of the cooled marsh tea liquid and fill size 00 gelatin capsules.
Allow the filled capsules to dry in a cool, dark place for 24 hours.
Store the dried marsh tea capsules in an airtight container for up to 3 months, taking 1-2 capsules daily as needed for swollen feet.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint capsule helps with swollen feet because it contains anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce inflammation and swelling in the feet. Peppermint oil, which is often the main ingredient in these capsules, has been shown to improve circulation and relax muscles, which can also help alleviate swelling. Additionally, peppermint has natural cooling and soothing effects that can provide relief from discomfort and pain associated with swollen feet. By reducing inflammation and improving circulation, peppermint capsules can help promote overall foot health and comfort.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Peppermint capsules can help reduce inflammation, which is important for swollen feet as it can alleviate discomfort and promote better blood circulation. This property is attributed to the active constituents, menthol and rosmarinic acid.
Analgesic: Peppermint has pain-relieving properties that can help alleviate the pain associated with swollen feet. This is due to the presence of menthol, which acts as a natural analgesic.

Diuretic: Peppermint has diuretic properties that can help reduce fluid retention, a common cause of swollen feet. This is attributed to the active constituent, menthol, which promotes urination and helps eliminate excess fluid from the body.

Antispasmodic: Peppermint can help relax muscles and reduce spasms, which is important for swollen feet as it can alleviate tension and improve circulation. This property is due to the presence of menthol and rosmarinic acid.

Circulatory stimulant: Peppermint can help improve blood flow and circulation, which is important for swollen feet as it can reduce inflammation and promote healing. This is attributed to the active constituents, menthol and flavonoids, which help dilate blood vessels and improve overall circulation.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves of the peppermint plant contain menthol, which has a cooling and anti-inflammatory effect, making it useful for reducing swelling in the feet.
Stems: The stems of the peppermint plant contain rosmarinic acid, which has been shown to reduce inflammation and swelling.
Flowers: The flowers of the peppermint plant contain flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making them useful for reducing swelling.
Seeds: The seeds of the peppermint plant contain essential oils, which have been shown to have a diuretic effect, helping to reduce fluid build-up and swelling in the feet.
remedy_recipe: Gather 1 cup of fresh peppermint leaves or 1/2 cup of dried peppermint leaves and grind them into a coarse powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Measure 500 mg of the ground peppermint leaves per capsule, using a capsule-filling machine and empty gelatin capsules.
Fill the capsules with the ground peppermint leaves, tapping them gently to ensure they are well-packed.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dry place for up to 6 months.
Take 1-2 capsules, 3 times a day, as needed, with a full glass of water.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Plantain capsule helps with swollen feet because it contains anti-inflammatory properties that can reduce inflammation and swelling in the feet. The herb is rich in bioactive compounds, such as flavonoids and iridoids, which have been shown to help alleviate symptoms of inflammation. Additionally, plantain has been used traditionally to improve circulation and promote wound healing, which can further help to reduce swelling and discomfort in the feet. By taking plantain capsules, individuals may experience relief from swollen feet and improved overall foot health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Plantain capsules can reduce inflammation, which is important for swollen feet as it helps alleviate the discomfort and pain caused by swelling. The active constituents responsible for this property include flavonoids, tannins, and mucilage.
Diuretic: Plantain capsules can promote diuresis, which helps remove excess fluid from the body, reducing swelling in the feet. The active constituent responsible for this property is potassium.
Astringent: Plantain capsules can constrict body tissues, which can help reduce swelling in the feet. The active constituents responsible for this property include tannins and mucilage.

Antioxidant: Plantain capsules can protect cells from damage caused by free radicals, which can help reduce inflammation and swelling. The active constituents responsible for this property include flavonoids and phenolic acids.

Analgesic: Plantain capsules can relieve pain, which is important for swollen feet as it helps alleviate discomfort caused by swelling. The active constituents responsible for this property include flavonoids, tannins, and mucilage.
remedy_parts: Leaves: The leaves of the plantain plant have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing swelling in feet.
Seeds: Plantain seeds are rich in mucilage, a substance that can help soothe irritation and reduce swelling.
Roots: The roots of the plantain plant have been used traditionally to treat a variety of ailments, including swelling and inflammation.
Bark: The bark of the plantain plant contains tannins, which have astringent properties that can help reduce swelling.
remedy_recipe: Harvest two cups of Plantago major leaves (also known as plantain) and rinse them thoroughly to remove dirt and bugs.
Chop the leaves and allow them to dry for 24 hours in a cool, dark place to preserve the medicinal compounds.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or a mortar and pestle.
Mix one tablespoon of the plantain powder with half a tablespoon of a binding agent, such as tapioca starch or gelatin, to help the powder hold its shape.

Fill size "00" empty capsules with the powder mixture using a capsule filling machine or by hand, and store the capsules in a cool, dry place until needed. Take one to two capsules up to three times a day as needed for swollen feet.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sumac capsule helps with swollen feet because it contains high levels of tannins and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. These compounds can help reduce swelling and inflammation in the feet by constricting blood vessels and reducing the flow of fluids into the tissues. Additionally, sumac is known to boost circulation, which can help alleviate swelling caused by poor blood flow. The herb also has diuretic properties, which can help eliminate excess fluid buildup in the body, further reducing swelling in the feet. Overall, sumac capsule can provide relief from swollen feet and promote overall foot health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Sumac capsules contain tannins and flavonoids that help reduce inflammation, which is important for swollen feet as inflammation can worsen the swelling.
Diuretic: Sumac has diuretic properties due to the presence of gallic acid, helping the body eliminate excess fluid, reducing swelling in the feet.
Antioxidant: The high antioxidant content, including ellagic acid, helps protect cells from damage, which can contribute to swelling and discomfort in the feet.
Astringent: Sumac's astringent properties, caused by tannins, help tighten and constrict blood vessels, reducing fluid buildup and swelling.
Analgesic: Sumac contains compounds with pain-relieving properties, such as kaempferol, which can alleviate discomfort associated with swollen feet.
remedy_parts: Bark: The bark of the sumac plant contains tannins, which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce swelling in feet.
Leaves: Sumac leaves are rich in flavonoids, which have been shown to improve circulation and reduce inflammation, making them useful for treating swollen feet.
Seeds: Sumac seeds are a good source of antioxidants and have been found to have diuretic properties, which can help reduce fluid buildup in the feet.
Berries: Sumac berries are rich in tannins and have astringent properties that can help reduce swelling and inflammation in the feet.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2 tablespoons of sumac berries and 1 cup of boiling water, then steep the berries for 20 minutes to create a sumac infusion.
Strain the sumac infusion and mix it with 1 tablespoon of tapioca starch to form a thick paste.
Divide the paste into 10 equal portions and shape each portion into a small capsule using gelatin capsule molds.
Allow the capsules to dry at room temperature for 24 hours before storing them in an airtight container.
Take one sumac capsule three times a day, 30 minutes before meals, to reduce swelling in the feet.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Butcher's broom capsule helps with swollen feet because it contains active compounds that constrict blood vessels, reducing the flow of blood to the feet and thereby decreasing swelling. This herb has anti-inflammatory and venotonic properties, which help to alleviate the symptoms of chronic venous insufficiency, a common cause of swollen feet. By improving circulation and reducing inflammation, butcher's broom capsules can provide relief from swelling and discomfort in the feet, making it an effective natural remedy for this common ailment.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Butcher's broom capsules contain ruscogenins, which have been shown to reduce inflammation, making it effective in alleviating swelling in the feet.
Venotonic: The plant's active compounds, such as saponins and ruscogenins, help to strengthen and tone the veins, reducing the pooling of fluids in the feet.
Diuretic: Butcher's broom has diuretic properties, promoting the excretion of excess fluid from the body, which can help to reduce swelling in the feet.
Improves blood circulation: The herb helps to improve blood flow, reducing the likelihood of fluid accumulation in the feet and ankles, thereby alleviating swelling.

Antioxidant: Butcher's broom contains antioxidant compounds, which can help protect blood vessels from damage and maintain their integrity, contributing to overall vascular health and reducing swelling.
remedy_parts: Rhizomes: The underground stem of butcher's broom, rich in steroidal saponins, helps reduce inflammation and constrict blood vessels, alleviating swollen feet.
Leaves: Containing flavonoids and essential oils, butcher's broom leaves may improve circulation and have anti-edematous properties, benefiting those with swollen feet.
Seeds: Packed with active compounds, butcher's broom seeds can help stimulate blood flow and reduce swelling in the feet, offering relief for those suffering from swollen feet.
Bark: The bark of butcher's broom contains alkaloids and tannins, which can help strengthen veins and capillaries, thereby reducing the symptoms of swollen feet.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2-3 teaspoons of dried butcher's broom herb, crush it in a mortar and pestle, and mix it with 1 cup of 190-proof grain alcohol or 100-proof vodka in a glass jar.
Seal the jar, store it in a cool, dark place, and let it steep for 2-4 weeks, shaking it daily.
After steeping, strain the mixture using cheesecloth or a fine-mesh strainer, and collect the liquid in a clean glass container.
Measure 500-600mg of the liquid extract per capsule using a capsule filling machine or by hand, and fill 00-sized empty gelatin capsules.
Dry the filled capsules in a cool, dark place for 24-48 hours before storing them in airtight containers. Take one capsule twice daily for swollen feet.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat swollen feet with herbal capsules is by using a natural anti-inflammatory agent like turmeric or ginger. These herbs, when consumed in capsule form, can help reduce inflammation and fluid retention in the feet. Additionally, herbs such as dandelion or parsley, known for their diuretic properties, can also be beneficial. However, it's crucial to consult with a healthcare professional before starting any new herbal supplement regimen, especially for those with pre-existing medical conditions or those taking prescription medications.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to swollen feet that are treated with herbal capsules include lymphedema and peripheral edema. Lymphedema is a condition that causes swelling in the arms and legs due to a blockage in the lymphatic system. Herbal capsules containing ingredients like turmeric, ginger, and dandelion may help reduce inflammation and improve lymphatic drainage. Peripheral edema, on the other hand, is swelling in the extremities caused by fluid buildup. Herbal remedies like horse chestnut and butcher's broom have been shown to improve circulation and reduce swelling in individuals with peripheral edema. However, it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before starting any new supplement regimen.
